title: Sudan Enters Fourth Year of War as Officials Describe 'Abandoned Crisis'
detail: As Sudan's devastating civil war between the Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) and Rapid Support Forces (RSF) enters its fourth year, international officials are describing the conflict as an 'abandoned crisis' with insufficient global attention and resources. The war, which began on April 15, 2023, has created one of the world's worst humanitarian disasters, displacing millions and pushing the country toward famine. Despite the scale of suffering, Sudan remains overshadowed by other global conflicts in terms of international focus and aid funding.

media.caption: Sudan conflict enters fourth year with humanitarian crisis deepening
